name: Earth Science Tech, Inc.
summary: PART I BUSINESS BACKGROUND AND OVERVIEW Earth Science Tech, Inc. (ETST or the Company) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on April 23, 2010, and subsequently redomiciled to the State of Florida on June 27, 2022. As of November 8, 2022, ETST operates as a strategic holding company, focused on value creation through the acquisition, operational optimization, and management of its operating businesses.
